area_anchor: Prime deploy gates and verification hardening
current_truth: Prime still has deploy-risk gaps: check-in expiry validation bug, missing functions typecheck coverage, CI zero-test pass paths, non-blocking critical E2E, missing Prime runtime secret validation, silent assistant degradation signaling, skipped orchestrator tests, and full-lint fail-open behavior.
next_scope_now: Implement fail-closed validation and CI/deploy gate hardening with runnable orchestrator coverage to remove silent deployment regressions.
adjacent_later: Add healthcheck strict routes for Prime critical guest/API flows
Add alerting for assistant fallback rate spikes
evidence_refs: operator-stated: take 2,4,5,6,8,9,11,12 forward via lp-do-ideas -> lp-do-build workflow
why: Silent or weak validation gates can allow Prime deployment with broken auth/runtime behavior and insufficient regression coverage.

intended_outcome.statement: Prime deploy and validation gates fail closed for critical runtime paths, and orchestrator coverage no longer depends on skipped test placeholders.
